title: Evaluating Human- and AI-Generated Code Quality Based on Code Smell
authors: Di Guo, Yadong Zhou, Dong Xu, Juan Wang, Xueli Jia
publish: Proceedings of the 2026 International Conference on AI, Computer Security and Trusted Data
title_zh: 基于代码坏味评估人类与AI生成的代码质量

title: A Structured Approach for Integrating Environmental Impact Assessment Throughout the IC Design Flow
authors: Maxime Péralta, Thibault Halter, Ivan Miro-Panades, Chiara Sandionigi
publish: 2026 IEEE Conference on Technologies for Sustainability (SusTech)
abstract: The production, use and disposal of integrated circuits cause multiple impacts on the environment, as a substantial carbon footprint, intensive water and energy use, and the generation of toxic waste. These impacts must be evaluated and mitigated since the design of the circuits. Despite the rising number of initiatives to quantify and optimize the end-to-end carbon footprint of circuits, there is a lack of analysis about how to integrate the assessment of multiple environmental impacts along the design flow. To address this gap, we propose a structured approach for the systematic integration of environmental assessment throughout the flow and we establish key requirements for ecodesign tools. We demonstrate that: 1) a preliminary, coarse-grain evaluation of the environmental impacts can be performed since the front-end phase of the design flow, but some metrics for environmental optimization can be applied only in the back-end; 2) designing circuits for multiple environmental criteria yields distinct solutions compared to optimizing for carbon only.
title_zh: 一种将环境影响评估贯穿于集成电路设计流程的结构化方法
abstract_zh: 集成电路的生产、使用和处置对环境造成多重影响，包括显著的碳足迹、大量的水和能源消耗，以及有毒废物的产生。这些影响必须从电路设计阶段就开始评估和缓解。尽管目前有越来越多的举措来量化和优化电路的端到端碳足迹，但关于如何在设计流程中整合多种环境影响评估的分析仍然不足。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种结构化的方法，用于在整个流程中系统性地整合环境评估，并为生态设计工具确立了关键要求。我们证明：1) 在设计流程的前端阶段即可对环境影响进行初步的粗略粒度评估，但某些环境优化指标仅能在后端阶段应用；2) 与仅针对碳优化相比，基于多环境标准设计电路会产生不同的解决方案。

title: Design Space Exploration of RISC-V Vector Extension targeting Embedded Processors
authors: Willian Analdo Nunes, Antônio Vinicius Corrêa dos Santos, Lucas Damo, Fernando Gehm Moraes
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computers
abstract: The RISC-V Vector Extension (RVV) offers flexibility and scalability for the growing demand for data-parallel workloads in embedded systems. However, RVV configurability introduces a large design space, the implications of which for resource-constrained processors remain insufficiently quantified. Understanding how parameters such as vector length (VLEN), maximum element size (ELEN), lane count, LMUL, and SEW affect system-level metrics enables efficient acceleration while preserving software portability and reducing verification effort. This work explores the RVV design space for embedded processors using a Zve32x subset and evaluates the impact of architectural parameters on performance, area, power, and energy efficiency. Annotated post-synthesis simulations across representative benchmarks enable quantitative trade-off analysis over multiple RVV configurations. Results show that larger VLENs and aggressive LMUL settings can yield substantial speedups but often increase area and power, whereas moderate configurations provide improved energy efficiency while meeting performance targets. The paper derives practical design guidelines for selecting RVV parameters in power- and areaconstrained embedded systems. The RISC-V core used in this work is publicly available at <uri xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">https://github.com/gaph-pucrs/RS5</uri>.
title_zh: 面向嵌入式处理器的RISC-V向量扩展设计空间探索
abstract_zh: RISC-V向量扩展（RVV）为嵌入式系统中日益增长的数据并行工作负载提供了灵活性和可扩展性。然而，RVV的可配置性带来了巨大的设计空间，而其对于资源受限处理器的影响尚未得到充分量化。理解向量长度（VLEN）、最大元素尺寸（ELEN）、通道数、LMUL和SEW等参数如何影响系统级指标，能够在保持软件可移植性并减少验证工作量的同时实现高效加速。本研究使用Zve32x子集探索了嵌入式处理器的RVV设计空间，并评估了架构参数对性能、面积、功耗和能效的影响。跨多个代表性基准测试的标注后综合仿真，使得能够针对多种RVV配置进行定量权衡分析。结果表明，更大的VLEN和激进的LMUL设置可以带来显著的加速，但通常会增加面积和功耗，而适中的配置在满足性能目标的同时提高了能效。本文为在功耗和面积受限的嵌入式系统中选择RVV参数提供了实用的设计指南。本研究中使用的RISC-V核心可在<uri xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">https://github.com/gaph-pucrs/RS5</uri>公开获取。

title: Effective Drive Current and Capacitance Models for NCFET-based Ring Oscillator
authors: Jungsu Kim, Changhwan Shin
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Accurate prediction of AC performance in negative capacitance field effect transistor (NCFET) circuits require effective modeling approaches that capture their unique electrical characteristics. This work proposes enhanced effective drive current (I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF3</sub> = [1.25I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">H</sub> + I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">L</sub> + I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">M</sub> + 0.375I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">DLIN</sub>]/3) and capacitance (C<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF_delay</sub>) models for analyzing and predicting the AC performance of ring oscillators (ROs) based on both NCFETs and baseline MOSFETs. The proposed I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF3</sub> model extends conventional approaches by incorporating an intermediate current component, resulting in improved correlation between DC effective resistance and AC resistance of the RO. Mixed-mode device and circuit simulations validate the model’s accuracy across various operating conditions. Compared to the previous model, i.e., I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF</sub>+ ([1.15I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">H</sub> + I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">L</sub>+ 0.25I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">DLIN</sub>]/2), the proposed approach significantly reduces the mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) from 9.8% to 1.4% and decreases the maximum error rate from 34.1% to 6.4%. Furthermore, this work addresses the unique capacitance-voltage characteristics of NCFETs, which exhibit peak capacitance (C<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">peak</sub>) at gate voltages below the operating voltage. The C<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF_delay</sub> model employs an average capacitance concept based on voltage-dependent gate charge variations. The analytical delay calculation, combining R<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF3_delay</sub> and C<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF_delay</sub>, demonstrates excellent agreement with RO simulation results, achieving a MAPE of 1.7% and a maximum error rate of 5.7%.
title_zh: 基于NCFET的环形振荡器的有效驱动电流与电容模型
abstract_zh: 在负电容场效应晶体管（NCFET）电路中准确预测交流性能需要能够捕捉其独特电学特性的有效建模方法。本文提出了增强型有效驱动电流模型（I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF3</sub> = [1.25I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">H</sub> + I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">L</sub> + I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">M</sub> + 0.375I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">DLIN</sub>]/3）和电容模型（C<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF_delay</sub>），用于分析和预测基于NCFET及基线MOSFET的环形振荡器（RO）的交流性能。所提出的I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF3</sub>模型通过引入中间电流分量扩展了传统方法，从而改善了RO的直流有效电阻与交流电阻之间的相关性。混合模式器件与电路仿真验证了该模型在各种工作条件下的准确性。与先前模型（即I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF</sub>+模型：[1.15I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">H</sub> + I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">L</sub>+ 0.25I<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">DLIN</sub>]/2）相比，所提出的方法将平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）从9.8%显著降低至1.4%，并将最大误差率从34.1%降低至6.4%。此外，本研究还解决了NCFET独特的电容-电压特性，即在低于工作电压的栅极电压下出现峰值电容（C<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">peak</sub>）。C<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF_delay</sub>模型采用基于电压相关栅极电荷变化的平均电容概念。结合R<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF3_delay</sub>和C<sub xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">EFF_delay</sub>的解析延迟计算与RO仿真结果表现出极好的一致性，实现了1.7%的MAPE和5.7%的最大误差率。

title: ChipGPT: Leveraging Large Language Models for Automated and Optimized Soc Floorplanning
authors: Aswini S, Anto Kumar R P, Varun CM, Seenuvasan P, Dhanalakshmi R, G Sekar
publish: 2026 12th International Conference on Communication and Signal Processing (ICCSP)
abstract: The escalating complexity of system-on-chip (SoC) designs has rendered traditional floor planning a critical physical design stage that is increasingly manual, timeconsuming, and expertise dependent. Although automated tools exist, they often converge to suboptimal solutions and struggle with complex multimodal constraints. This study introduces ChipGPT, a novel framework that leverages the advanced reasoning and sequence modeling capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate and optimize SoC floor planning. ChipGPT encodes the netlist, macroproperties, and design constraints into a structured textual prompt. An LLM agent, acting as an intelligent optimizer, interprets the prompt and proposes iterative floorplan refinements. These proposals are evaluated by a cost engine that calculates the wirelength, area, and congestion, with the results fed back to guide subsequent reasoning. On standard benchmarks, ChipGPT demonstrates a <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1 5}-\mathbf{3 0 \%}$</tex> reduction in total wirelength compared to conventional simulated-annealing and commercial auto-placer baselines. It generates highquality, human-competitive floor plans in a fraction of the time. This study establishes a new paradigm by demonstrating LLMs' potential of LLMs as intelligent agents for complex, constraint-driven optimization in electronic design automation.
title_zh: ChipGPT：利用大语言模型实现自动化和优化的SoC布局规划
abstract_zh: 系统级芯片（SoC）设计的日益复杂性使得传统的布局规划成为关键的物理设计阶段，该阶段日益依赖人工、耗时且依赖专业知识。尽管存在自动化工具，但它们往往收敛于次优解，且难以处理复杂的多模态约束。本研究提出了ChipGPT，这是一个新颖的框架，利用大型语言模型（LLMs）的高级推理和序列建模能力来自动化和优化SoC布局规划。ChipGPT将网表、宏属性及设计约束编码为结构化的文本提示。一个作为智能优化器的LLM代理解释该提示，并提出迭代的布局优化方案。这些方案由一个成本引擎评估，计算线长、面积和拥塞程度，并将结果反馈以指导后续推理。在标准基准测试中，与传统的模拟退火和商业自动布局器基线相比，ChipGPT的总线长减少了15%-30%。它能在极短时间内生成高质量、达到人类水平的布局方案。本研究通过展示LLMs作为智能代理在电子设计自动化中处理复杂、约束驱动优化任务的潜力，建立了一种新范式。

title: Hardware-Accelerated Parallel Wrong-Path Execution for Spectre Gadget Detection
authors: Fangzheng Lin, Zeyu Gao, Yanru Lin, Yangyu Chen, Hiroshi Sasaki
publish: IEEE Computer Architecture Letters
abstract: Spectre vulnerabilities pose new threats to computer system security, and detecting Spectre gadgets is an important step toward effective countermeasures. Detection requires exploring program behavior along branch-mispredicted execution paths (i.e., wrong paths), which existing dynamic scanners emulate in software—incurring high overhead and limiting parallel exploration. This paper proposes a hardware-assisted dynamic gadget detection architecture that offloads wrong-path executions to a pool of in-order shadow cores on a specialized asymmetric multicore platform, enabling multiple paths to be explored in parallel. The design also features shadow memory versioning to preserve the memory view at the branch point without full memory duplication. We prototype the proposed architecture on an Xilinx VU13P FPGA. Evaluation shows that the prototype achieves 1.25–5.24× speedup over software-based detectors.
title_zh: 用于Spectre漏洞利用片段检测的硬件加速并行错误路径执行
abstract_zh: Spectre漏洞对计算机系统安全构成了新的威胁，检测Spectre gadgets是迈向有效防护措施的重要一步。检测需要探索沿分支误预测执行路径（即错误路径）的程序行为，现有的动态扫描器通过软件模拟这些路径——导致高开销并限制了并行探索。本文提出了一种硬件辅助的动态gadget检测架构，该架构将错误路径执行卸载到专用非对称多核平台上的一组顺序影子核，从而能够并行探索多条路径。该设计还采用了影子内存版本控制，以在分支点保留内存视图，而无需完全复制内存。我们在Xilinx VU13P FPGA上实现了该架构的原型。评估表明，该原型相比基于软件的检测器实现了1.25–5.24倍的加速。

publish: ACM Transactions on Architecture and Code Optimization

title: An End-To-End on-Prem Vulnerability Assessment Framework Using Hybrid CPE Matching and Structured Mitigation Generation
authors: Griventh Griffith Agustin, Fatih Achmad Al-Haritz, Yohan Muliono
publish: 2026 12th International Conference on Communication and Signal Processing (ICCSP)
abstract: Vulnerability scanners frequently produce findings that are difficult to operationalize due to inconsistent local software identifiers and the absence of actionable remediation guidance. This paper presents an end-to-end onpremises vulnerability assessment framework that performs local software inventory collection, correlates entries to standardized Common Platform Enumeration (CPE) identifiers via a hybrid matching approach, and generates structured mitigation guidance for direct operational use. The hybrid matcher combines trigram-based candidate retrieval with semantic selection using a self-hosted Large Language Model (LLM), ensuring sensitive asset data remains within the organization boundary. A consensus-based caching mechanism reduces repeated inference costs over successive scans. Mitigation output is constrained to JSON format with schema validation and fallback handling to ensure UI stability. Experiments show a 93% reduction in scan latency after cache warm-up and a 95 % JSON validity rate, supporting the practicality of on-premises LLM-assisted vulnerability management in privacy-sensitive environments.
title_zh: 一种使用混合CPE匹配和结构化缓解方案生成的端到端本地漏洞评估框架
abstract_zh: 漏洞扫描器通常因本地软件标识符不一致以及缺乏可操作的修复指南，导致其发现的漏洞难以实际落地处理。本文提出一种端到端的本地部署漏洞评估框架，该框架执行本地软件清单采集，通过混合匹配方法将条目关联到标准化的通用平台枚举（CPE）标识符，并生成结构化修复指南以供直接操作使用。混合匹配器结合了基于三元组的候选检索与使用自托管大语言模型（LLM）的语义选择，确保敏感资产数据始终保留在组织边界内。一种基于共识的缓存机制可降低连续扫描中的重复推理成本。修复输出被约束为JSON格式，并通过模式验证和回退处理确保用户界面稳定性。实验表明，缓存预热后扫描延迟降低93%，JSON有效性达95%，这证实了在隐私敏感环境中采用本地LLM辅助漏洞管理的实用性。

authors: Ayomide Akinsanya, Tegan Brennan

title_zh: FedLeaks: 在自适应神经网络联邦学习中创建时序信道泄露

title: Low-Power VLSI Design for Edge AI Accelerators in IoT Devices
authors: Nivitha G, Aravind T, R. Saravanakumar
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Trends in Electronics and Informatics (ICOEI)
abstract: The paper’s main goal is to provide an energy-efficient hardware architecture that can run machine learning activities directly on edge devices with little delay and power expenditure. As the need for smart IoT apps develops, Artificial Intelligence (AI) accelerators that work well with Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) are needed for real-time data processing with stringent power constraints. Traditional AI computation on cloud platforms has security concerns and latency since data is always being sent. So, to move AI processing to the edge, we need small, low-power VLSI architectures that can conduct neural calculations quickly. Conventional accelerators have a lot of switching activity, waste a lot of power, and can’t be easily scaled up on Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) and Application-Specific Integrated Circuit (ASIC) platforms; thus, they aren’t good for IoT edge situations. The goal of this project is to use VHDL on Xilinx ISE 14.7 to design and build a low-power AI accelerator that improves area, time, and power while keeping computational accuracy. The design uses clock gating, reducing the width of operands, and sharing resources in a matrix multiply–accumulate (MAC) architecture. A control Finite State Machine (FSM) and gated clock logic keep the operation flow running smoothly, while ISim is used to test functionality via simulations. The suggested architecture lowered dynamic power use and area use while keeping throughput the same, showing that it is good for real-time edge AI activities on Internet of Things (IoT) devices.
title_zh: 面向物联网设备中边缘人工智能加速器的低功耗超大规模集成电路设计
abstract_zh: 本文的主要目标是提供一种能效高的硬件架构，使其能够直接在边缘设备上运行机器学习任务，同时保持低延迟和低功耗。随着智能物联网应用的发展，需要与超大规模集成电路（VLSI）良好配合的人工智能（AI）加速器，以在严格的功耗约束下实现实时数据处理。传统的云计算平台上的AI计算存在安全问题和延迟，因为数据需要持续传输。因此，为了将AI处理迁移到边缘，我们需要小型、低功耗的VLSI架构，能够快速执行神经计算。传统的加速器存在大量开关活动，功耗浪费严重，且难以在现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）和专用集成电路（ASIC）平台上进行扩展，因此不适用于物联网边缘场景。本项目的目标是利用Xilinx ISE 14.7上的VHDL，设计并构建一款低功耗AI加速器，在保持计算精度的同时优化面积、时间和功耗。该设计采用了时钟门控、减小操作数位宽以及矩阵乘累加（MAC）架构中的资源共享。一个控制有限状态机（FSM）和门控时钟逻辑确保操作流程平稳运行，同时使用ISim通过仿真验证功能。所提出的架构在保持吞吐量不变的情况下，降低了动态功耗和面积占用，表明其适用于物联网（IoT）设备上的实时边缘AI任务。

title: Original Sin of npm: A Study on Vulnerability Propagation in JavaScript Dependency Networks
authors: Michael Robinson, Sajal Halder, Muhammad Ejaz Ahmed, Muhammad Ikram, Seyit Camtepe, Hyoungshick Kim
publish: Proceedings of the ACM Asia Conference on Computer and Communications Security
title_zh: npm的原罪：JavaScript依赖网络中漏洞传播的研究
